'''Osman''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] who served as one of [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga's]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
